title: AI Rigor Detection - framework that detects performative rigor in AI-generated analysis; publication status is separated from validation status
public_claim: A rigor-detection framework for AI outputs that look scholarly, structured, or cited while failing to do the underlying evidentiary work.
distinctive_mechanism: It separates the appearance of rigor from actual warrant: citation binding, source relevance, reasoning continuity, rubric fit, counterclaim handling, claim strength, Goodhart risk, adversarial-gaming flags, and validation limits are inspected as distinct failure surfaces.
use_value: It matters because AI-assisted analysis can fail by sounding careful; the project gives reviewers a vocabulary for detecting rigor theater and a path toward testing it against labeled rigorous and performative examples before it becomes accepted judgment.
